rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL C ROBERTS JR VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT LESLIE CONTROLS, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. BURDEN SHIFTED AND PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PRESENTED CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE OF MALICE. DENIED AS TO REMAINDER OF MOTION. C.C.P. SECTION 437C(F); CITY OF EMERYVILLE V SUPERIOR COURT (1991) CAL APP 4TH 21, 25. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL C ROBERTS JR VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT SEPCO CORPORATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL C ROBERTS JR VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT CRANE CO.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF IN THAT DEFENDANT DID NOT NEGATE PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY. DENY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO ISSUES ONE THROUGH THREE BECAUSE THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO PLAINTIFF'S EXPOSURE TO DEFENDANT'S PRODUCTS WITH ASBESTOS. GRANT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO ISSUES FOUR THROUGH SIX; NO OPPOSITION TO THIS PORTION OF THE MOTION. GRANT AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES, BURDEN SHIFTED AND PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT CLEAR AND CONVINCING EVIDENCE OF MALICE BY OFFICERS, DIRECTORS OR MANAGERS OF DEFENDANT. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RUSSELL C ROBERTS JR VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT METALCLAD INSULATION CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO CLAIMS FOR FALSE REPRESENTATION, INTENTIONAL TORT AND PREMISES LIABILITY AS TO THE THIRD, FOURTH AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION BECAUSE PLAINTIFF DOES NOT OPPOSE THIS PORTION OF THE MOTION. DEFENDANT'S SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES AND PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES ARE SUFFICIENT TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF ON PUNITIVE DAMAGES. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT CLEAR AND CONVICING EVIDENCE THAT AN OFFICER, DIRECTOR OR MANAGING AGENT ACTED WITH MALICE. MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION GRANTED AS TO PUNITIVE DAMAGES. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: FERNANDO CLOUD VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 6. DEFENDANT PLANT INSULATION COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PROOF. THE DECLARATIONS OF AIELLO AND AY AND PLAINTIFF'S DEPOSITION TESTIMONY CREATE TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON THE ISSUE OF EXPOSURE. BECAUSE DEFENDANT RELIES ON THESE FACTS TO SUPPORT MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION, THERE ARE TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT AS TO EACH OF THE CLAIMS. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: FERNANDO CLOUD VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 6. DEFENDANT LAMONS GASKET COMPANY'S, F.K.A. LAMONS METAL GASKET CO., MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: HEARING REQUIRED. DEFENDANT'S COURTESY COPIES FAILED TO INCLUDE EXHIBITS I AND J AND SO THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE IF THE RESPONSES ARE FACTUALLY DEVOID, IN PARTICULAR, WHAT FACTS PLAINTIFF PRESENTED LINKING DEFENDANT TO FLEXITALLIC GASKET AND/OR POWER ENGINEERING. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTIONS TO PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE ARE SUSTAINED. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: RAFAEL RAMIREZ VS. SUI QI CHEN et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, DECEMBER 28, 2007, LINE 16. DEFENDANTS SUI CHEN AND EDITH LAU'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE LANDLORD GAVE THE TENANT NINETY DAYS TO CURE THE DEFAULTS. AFTER NINETY DAYS, THE LANDLORD GAVE THE TENANT THIRTY DAYS TO VACATE. UNDER THE LEASE IF THE TENANT DOES NOT CURE THE DEFAULTS, THE LANDLORD "MAY TERMINATE THIS LEASE ON NOT LESS THAN THREE MONTHS DAYS (SIC) NOTICE TO LESSEE." GIVEN THE EXPRESS TERMS OF THE LEASE, THE LANDLORD HAS NOT COMPLIED WITH THE THREE MONTH TERMINATION CLAUSE. THE LETTER OF JANUARY 29, 2007 DOES NOT CONSTITUTE COMPLIANCE WITH THE TERMS OF THE LEASE. IT DOES NOT APPEAR THAT PLAINTIFF CAN AMEND TO CURE THIS DEFECT. =(302/PJM/VC)
